mapper.sql: id, disclosure_id, internal_no, biz_type, mail_send_log_id, file_name, file_ext, file_path, file_url, file_size, content_type, is_required, sort_no, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO disclosure_attachment ( disclosure_id, internal_no, biz_type, mail_send_log_id, file_name, file_ext, file_path, file_url, file_size, content_type, is_required, sort_no, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{disclosureId}, #{internalNo}, #{bizType}, #{mailSendLogId}, #{fileName}, #{fileExt}, #{filePath}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, IFNULL(#{isRequired}, 0), IFNULL(#{sortNo}, 0), #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, IFNULL(#{deleted}, 0), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE disclosure_attachment SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM disclosure_attachment WHERE disclosure_id = #{disclosureId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
